title: abutilon sundaicum
intro: Abutilon sundaicum, also known as the Malabar abutilon or Java mallow, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Abutilon sundaicum is typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be applied topically to treat various ailments.
